raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ohtrâ Deena/ kad
wiꞥſch Gedaliju bij nokawis/un
neveens to finnaja/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nahze Wihrî no Si-
fema/ no Sihlus/ un no Sa-
martias/ aſtondefinitis Wihrî/
kas Bahrdû bij nodsinnuſchi/un
tahs Drehbes faptobſtifschi / un
paſchi eepraififschees / un winna
Rohkâ bija Ehdamo-Uppuris un un
Wihraks/ ka tee to nestu ta KUN-
GA Namna.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Ismaëls Netanijue
Dehls gabje ahra winneem pret-
ti no Mizpas/ eedams un rau-
dadams. Un kad wiꞥſch tohs
faſtappe/ tad fazzija wiꞥſch us
teein : Nahzeet pee Gedaljus Ai-
kama Dehla.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet kad tee Pilsſahta
Widdû nahze/ noschnandse tohs
Ismaëls Netantius Dehls/ un
mette tohs Bedres Wtddû /
wiꞥſch/ un tee Wihrî/ kas pee
winna bija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet starp teem tappe def-
mits Wihrî atrasti/ tee fazzija
uhs Ismaëlu: Ne nokaujmuhß/
jo mums irr apſlehptas Mantas
Eihrumâ/ Riveeschi/ un Meeschi/
un Etje/ un Meddus. Tad at-
statje wiꞥſch/ un ne nokawe tohs
starp winnu Brahteem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ta Bedre/ karp Isina-
els to Wihrû nokantas Meesas
nomette/ ko wiꞥſch lihds ar Ge-
dalju bij nokawis/ bija ta patti/
ko tas Rehninsch Affus darrija/
Baefsus deht ta Rehnina no Isra-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Ismaëls aistwedd
wiſſns atliffuschus Landis/ ka
Mizpâ bija/ prohti ta Rehnin-
Meitas/ un wiſſns Laudis/ ka
eekich Mizpas bij atlizzinati/
NebusarAdans tas Pils-Karra
Wihrû Wirtneeks Gedaljus
Aikama Dehlan bij pawehlejs
un Ismaëls Netanijus Deh-
aistwedde t chs / un gabje paw-
zeldamees uhs Ammona Beh-
neem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu Joanans Kareu-
Dehls/ un wiſſi Karra-Ahwersti
kas ar winna bija / dsirdeja ta
Launu/ fo Ismaëls Netantijue
Dehls bij darrijs/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad rehme tee wiſſue
Karra-Wihrus/ un gabje ar Is-
maëlu Netantijue Dehlu karxot,
un tee atradde to pee ta leela ub-
dens/ kas pee Stbeona irraid.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad wiſſi Laudis/ ka-
pee Ismaëla bija/ Joanann Ka-
reis Dehlu/ un wiſſus Karra-
Ahwerſtus/ kas ar winna bija-
redseja/ tad tee preezajahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſſi Laudis/ fo Is-
maës no Mizpas bij aistwed-
vis/ grecsahs/ un gabje atpakka-
pee Joanana Kareüs Dehla.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tomehr Ismaëls Meta-
nijus Dehls iſmukke ar astozee-
Wiheem no Joanaka/ un gabje-
pee teem Ammona Behrneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad jehme Joanans Ka-
reis Dehls/ un wiſſi Karra Ah-
werſti / kas pee winna bija /
wif-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
